name: Protocol Steward Specialist
description: Maintains the shared A2A profile, harness quality bar, naming conventions, and handoff consistency across an agentic crew.

skills.name: A2A Profile and Role Review
skills.description: Checks harness completeness, role-card boundaries, narrow What To Read lists, Agent Card coverage, AgentSkill compatibility, and Agentic Crew payload conformance.
examples: Review whether a new specialist overlaps existing agents.
Check that a crew pack has complete A2A Agent Cards.
